pageDeck.heading: Writing Samples
paragraphs: These writing samples represent the kinds of artifacts I produce throughout the product lifecycle: from the roadmaps that define where we're going, to the specifications that guide how we get there, and finally to the audits that prove the results.
Each document demonstrates how I approach real-world product, design, and engineering challenges.

productStrategy.heading: Defining the Vision
productStrategy.intro: Product strategy begins with a clear understanding of what to build and why. These documents show how I translate business objectives and user needs into SAFe-structured roadmaps; decomposing strategy into epics, features, and product backlog items that give teams a shared direction and stakeholders a transparent view of what's ahead.

uxDesign.heading: Designing the Experience
uxDesign.intro: Usable software requires intentional design decisions, documented clearly enough for developers to build and QA to validate. These artifacts cover interaction design specifications, accessibility compliance reports, and usability methodologies — bridging the gap between design intent and implementation.

technical.heading: Evaluating the Technology
technical.intro: Sound technical decisions require structured evaluation, not just opinion. These documents demonstrate how I assess frameworks, weigh trade-offs, and record architectural decisions so that teams understand not just what was chosen, but why.

processOps.heading: Operationalizing the Practice
processOps.intro: Shipping great software consistently requires more than talented individuals; it requires documented processes that scale. These artifacts cover QA automation strategy, team onboarding programs, and release management practices that help organizations move from ad hoc execution to repeatable discipline.

costSavings.heading: Measuring the Impact
costSavings.intro: Documentation isn't just about planning — it's about proving results. This section showcases how structured analysis, operational runbooks, and clear reporting can identify and validate significant cost reductions — turning infrastructure audits into measurable business outcomes worth over $360K CAD in annualized savings for Collabware.

productRoadmapPhase3.title: Product Roadmap — Phase 3
productRoadmapPhase3.description: SAFe-formatted roadmap with epics, features, and product backlog items for the core pages development phase.

productRoadmapPhase4.title: Product Roadmap — Phase 4
productRoadmapPhase4.description: SAFe-formatted roadmap covering enhanced features: theming, i18n, animations, accessibility, and SEO.

prdLightbox.title: Product Requirements Document — Project Gallery & Lightbox
prdLightbox.description: Detailed PRD for the portfolio's project gallery layout and image lightbox interaction patterns.

idsLightbox.title: Interaction Design Specification — Project Gallery & Lightbox
idsLightbox.description: Comprehensive IDS documenting interaction patterns, state transitions, and responsive behavior for the project gallery and lightbox components.

usabilityTestPlan.title: Usability Test Plan & Findings — Project Gallery & Lightbox
usabilityTestPlan.description: Task-based usability test plan and findings for the project gallery and lightbox, covering test scenarios, participant tasks, success metrics, and actionable findings.

wcagGuide.title: WCAG 2.2 Compliance Guide
wcagGuide.description: Detailed guide mapping WCAG 2.2 Level AA success criteria to the portfolio's implementation approach.

accessibilityStatement.title: Accessibility Statement
accessibilityStatement.description: Public-facing accessibility commitment documenting compliance scope, testing methodology, and known limitations.

adrI18n.title: Architecture Decision Record — i18n Library Selection
adrI18n.description: ADR evaluating internationalization approaches for the Next.js migration, documenting the rationale for selecting i18next.

frameworkEval.title: Front-End Framework Evaluation
frameworkEval.description: Structured comparison of front-end frameworks considered for the portfolio modernization, with scoring criteria and final recommendation.

qaStrategy.title: QA Automation Strategy
qaStrategy.description: BDD-driven QA strategy with CI/CD integration, covering test pyramid structure, tooling selection, and coverage targets.

onboardingGuide.title: Collabspace Product Knowledge Onboarding Guide
onboardingGuide.description: 14-module onboarding curriculum designed for new team members, covering how customers use the major feature areas and domain knowledge.

changelogStrategy.title: Changelog & Release Notes Strategy
changelogStrategy.description: Multi-file changelog philosophy documenting naming conventions, versioning format, and release note distillation process.

gherkinPhase3.title: Gherkin Test Cases — Phase 3 Development
gherkinPhase3.description: BDD-style acceptance criteria for the core pages phase, covering portfolio grid, project lightbox, résumé, and colophon features in Given/When/Then format.

gherkinPhase4.title: Gherkin Test Cases — Phase 4 Development
gherkinPhase4.description: BDD-style acceptance criteria for enhanced features including theming, internationalization, scroll animations, accessibility compliance, and SEO optimization.

costSavingsRoadmap.title: Additional Cost Savings Roadmap
costSavingsRoadmap.description: Strategic presentation outlining further infrastructure cost optimization opportunities. Contact Sing to request a presentation of the full roadmap.

elasticsearchRunbook.title: Elasticsearch Node & Disk Scale-Down Runbook
elasticsearchRunbook.description: Step-by-step operational runbook for safely scaling down Elasticsearch cluster nodes and disk allocation, with rollback procedures and monitoring checkpoints.

defenderRunbook.title: Defender for Storage Reduction Runbook
defenderRunbook.description: PowerShell-based operational runbook for bulk-disabling Microsoft Defender for Storage on Azure accounts, with verification scripts, troubleshooting guide, and cost analysis.

costCuttingAudit.title: Cost Savings Report
costCuttingAudit.description: Azure cloud infrastructure cost optimization audit identifying 40% reduction in annualized hosting costs, documenting analysis methodology, findings, and implemented savings of $360K CAD.
